revision.comment: 猫啼温泉、福島県石川町の温泉
revision.text:
'''猫啼温泉（ねこなきおんせん）'''とは、[[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]]にある温泉のことである。
== アクセス == *車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ_(福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号線]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度 *鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度
== 泉質 == *単純弱放射能冷鉱泉
== 温泉街 == 温泉街はないものの、今出川の流域に2件の旅館が存在する。
== 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流歌人、[[和泉式部]]に縁のある温泉である。和泉式部が京に上る際に、愛猫を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、鉱泉の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。
== 関連項目 == {{ウィキポータルリンク|温泉}} *[[温泉]]、[[温泉街]]、[[外湯]]、[[温泉番付]] *[[日本の温泉地一覧]] - [[日本の温泉画像一覧]]
== 外部リンク ==
{{onsen-stub|ねこなきおんせん}}
[[Category:福島県の温泉|ねこなきおんせん]]

当地にある旅館を舞台とした小説も書かれている。[[内田康夫]]の「十三の墓標」、[[舟橋聖一]]の「ある女の遠景」などの小説である。
== 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流[[歌人]]、[[和泉式部]]に縁があるとされる温泉である。[[開湯伝説]]によれば、和泉式部が京に上る際に、[[ネコ|愛猫]]を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、[[鉱泉]]の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。

== Notable Hot Springs == === In Japan === * Futamata Radium Onsen (Hokkaido) * {{ill|Misasa Onsen|ja|三朝温泉}} (Tottori) * {{ill|Sekigane Onsen|ja|関金温泉}} (Tottori) * {{ill|Arima Onsen|ja|有馬温泉}} (Hyogo) * {{ill|Masutomi Onsen|ja|増富温泉}} (Yamanashi) * {{ill|Tamagawa Onsen (Akita)|ja|玉川温泉 (秋田県)}} (Akita) * Ena Gorge Onsen (Gifu) * Ikeda Radium Onsen (Shimane) * {{ill|Bobata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} (Fukushima) * {{ill|Nekodaki Onsen|ja|猫啼温泉}} (Fukushima) * Baba-no-Yu Onsen (Fukushima)

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 猫啼温泉 |画像 = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |コメント = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |所在地 = [[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]] |交通アクセス = 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度
鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 |泉質 = [[放射能泉]] |泉温 = 8 |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''猫啼温泉'''（ねこなきおんせん）は、[[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]]（旧[[令制国|国]][[陸奥国]]・[[明治]]以降の旧[[磐城国]]）にある[[温泉]]である。 == 泉質 == * 単純弱放射能冷鉱泉 ** [[源泉]][[温度]]8.0℃ == 温泉地 == [[温泉街]]はないものの、[[今出川 (福島県)|今出川]]の流域に2軒の[[旅館]]が存在する。 当地にある旅館を舞台とした小説も書かれている。[[内田康夫]]の『十三の墓標』、[[舟橋聖一]]の『[[ある女の遠景]]』などである。 == 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流[[歌人]]、[[和泉式部]]に縁があるとされる温泉である。[[開湯伝説]]によれば、和泉式部が京に上る際に、[[ネコ|愛猫]]を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、[[鉱泉]]の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。 == アクセス == * 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度 * 鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 == 関連項目 == * 石川町内の温泉 ** [[片倉温泉 (福島県)|片倉温泉]] ** [[母畑温泉]] ** [[塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|塩ノ沢温泉]] == 外部リンク == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html 石川町の4つの温泉郷を湯めぐりして話題の"湯治" 気分を味わう。] - 石川町 * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php ふくしま湯けむり探訪：猫啼温泉] - [[福島民友新聞]] {{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ねこなきおんせん}} [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:New pages]] [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive springs]][[Category:Radioactive springs forks]][[Category:pages goodbye $1]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 猫啼温泉 |画像 = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |コメント = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |所在地 = [[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]] |交通アクセス = 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度
鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 |泉質 = [[放射能泉]] |泉温 = 8 |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''猫啼温泉'''（ねこなきおんせん）は、[[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]]（旧[[令制国|国]][[陸奥国]]・[[明治]]以降の旧[[磐城国]]）にある[[温泉]]である。 == 泉質 == * 単純弱放射能冷鉱泉 ** [[源泉]][[温度]]8.0℃ == 温泉地 == [[温泉街]]はないものの、[[今出川 (福島県)|今出川]]の流域に2軒の[[旅館]]が存在する。 当地にある旅館を舞台とした小説も書かれている。[[内田康夫]]の『十三の墓標』、[[舟橋聖一]]の『[[ある女の遠景]]』などである。 == 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流[[歌人]]、[[和泉式部]]に縁があるとされる温泉である。[[開湯伝説]]によれば、和泉式部が京に上る際に、[[ネコ|愛猫]]を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、[[鉱泉]]の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。 == アクセス == * 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度 * 鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 == 関連項目 == * 石川町内の温泉 ** [[片倉温泉 (福島県)|片倉温泉]] ** [[母畑温泉]] ** [[塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|塩ノ沢温泉]] == 外部リンク == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html 石川町の4つの温泉郷を湯めぐりして話題の"湯治" 気分を味わう。] - 石川町 * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php ふくしま湯けむり探訪：猫啼温泉] - [[福島民友新聞]] {{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{citation needed|ねこなきおんせん}} [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Unsorted_completion_categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive springs]][[Category:Radioactive springs forks]][[Category:pages]][[Category:goodbye $1]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]]

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 猫啼温泉 |画像 = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |コメント = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |所在地 = [[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]] |交通アクセス = 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度
鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 |泉質 = [[放射能泉]] |泉温 = 8 |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''猫啼温泉'''（ねこなきおんせん）は、[[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]]（旧[[令制国|国]][[陸奥国]]・[[明治]]以降の旧[[磐城国]]）にある[[温泉]]である。 == 泉質 == * 単純弱放射能冷鉱泉 ** [[源泉]][[温度]]8.0℃ == 温泉地 == [[温泉街]]はないものの、[[今出川 (福島県)|今出川]]の流域に2軒の[[旅館]]が存在する。 当地にある旅館を舞台とした小説も書かれている。[[内田康夫]]の『十三の墓標』、[[舟橋聖一]]の『[[ある女の遠景]]』などである。 == 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流[[歌人]]、[[和泉式部]]に縁があるとされる温泉である。[[開湯伝説]]によれば、和泉式部が京に上る際に、[[ネコ|愛猫]]を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、[[鉱泉]]の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。 == アクセス == * 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度 * 鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 == 関連項目 == * 石川町内の温泉 ** [[片倉温泉 (福島県)|片倉温泉]] ** [[母畑温泉]] ** [[塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|塩ノ沢温泉]] == 外部リンク == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html 石川町の4つの温泉郷を湯めぐりして話題の"湯治" 気分を味わう。] - 石川町 * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php ふくしま湯けむり探訪：猫啼温泉] - [[福島民友新聞]] {{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{citation needed|ねこなきおんせん}} [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Unsorted_completion_categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive springs]][[Category:Radioactive springs forks]][[Category:pages]][[Category:goodbye $1]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}}

鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 |泉質 = [[放射能泉]] |泉温 = 8 |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''猫啼温泉'''（ねこなきおんせん）は、[[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]]（旧[[令制国|国]][[陸奥国]]・[[明治]]以降の旧[[磐城国]]）にある[[温泉]]である。 == 泉質 == * 単純弱放射能冷鉱泉 ** [[源泉]][[温度]]8.0℃ == 温泉地 == [[温泉街]]はないものの、[[今出川 (福島県)|今出川]]の流域に2軒の[[旅館]]が存在する。 当地にある旅館を舞台とした小説も書かれている。[[内田康夫]]の『十三の墓標』、[[舟橋聖一]]の『[[ある女の遠景]]』などである。 == 歴史 == [[平安時代]]中期の女流[[歌人]]、[[和泉式部]]に縁があるとされる温泉である。[[開湯伝説]]によれば、和泉式部が京に上る際に、[[ネコ|愛猫]]を当地において行ってしまった。その置いていかれた猫は、主人である和泉式部を探して啼き続けたと言われている。このことから、温泉名に猫啼温泉とつけられたといわれる。この猫は、その後に病にかかるものの、当地の温泉に浸かった事により元気を取り戻した。このことで、[[鉱泉]]の効能に地元の人たちが気づき、湯治場として発展することとなった。 == アクセス == * 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度 * 鉄道：[[水郡線]][[磐城石川駅]]から徒歩15分程度 == 関連項目 == * 石川町内の温泉 ** [[片倉温泉 (福島県)|片倉温泉]] ** [[母畑温泉]] ** [[塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|塩ノ沢温泉]] == 外部リンク == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html 石川町の4つの温泉郷を湯めぐりして話題の"湯治" 気分を味わう。] - 石川町 * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php ふくしま湯けむり探訪：猫啼温泉] - [[福島民友新聞]] {{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{citation needed|ねこなきおんせん}} [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive springs]][[Category:Radioactive springs forks]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}}

{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 猫啼温泉 |画像 = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |コメント = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |所在地 = [[福島県]][[石川郡]][[石川町]] |交通アクセス = 車：[[あぶくま高原道路]][[玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|玉川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約20分程度、[[東北自動車道]][[須賀川インターチェンジ|須賀川IC]]から[[国道118号]]で約40分程度

{{Japanese Hot Springs |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |Image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

{{Japanese Hot Springs |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |Image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{Japanese Hot Springs |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |Image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

{{infobox Onsens |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |Image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:猫啼温泉]][[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]][[Category:Radioactive spring forks]][[Category:pages]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞}} {{Hot Spring}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:Radioactive spring forks]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}}

Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:Radioactive spring forks]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}}

revision.comment: removing the duplicate onsen templates and moving them all to the bottom
revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉|12=draft}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State|12=draft}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国|12=draft}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国|12=draft}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉|12=draft}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度|12=draft}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街|12=draft}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館|12=draft}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa|12=draft}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫|12=draft}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一|12=draft}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人|12=draft}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部|12=draft}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説|12=draft}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze|12=draft}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:Radioactive spring forks]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:Radioactive spring forks]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉|12=draft}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State|12=draft}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国|12=draft}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国|12=draft}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉|12=draft}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度|12=draft}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街|12=draft}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館|12=draft}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa|12=draft}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫|12=draft}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一|12=draft}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人|12=draft}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部|12=draft}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説|1=Onsen Origin Myth|12=draft}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze|12=draft}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉|12=draft}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State|12=draft}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国|12=draft}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国|12=draft}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉|12=draft}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度|12=draft}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街|12=draft}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館|12=draft}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa|12=draft}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫|12=draft}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一|12=draft}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人|12=draft}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部|12=draft}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説|1=Onsen Origin Myth|12=draft}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze|12=draft}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 40 minutes.
By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. |Spring Quality = {{ill|Radioactive Hot Spring|de|Radioaktive Quelle|ja|放射能泉|12=draft}} |Temperature = 8°C |Discharge = |pH = |Fluid Classification = |Osmotic Pressure Classification = |Number of Lodging Facilities = |Total Guest Capacity = |Annual Number of Bathers = |Statistical Year = |External Links = |Special Notes = }} '''Neko-naki Onsen''' (猫啼温泉) is a {{ill|Hot Spring|de|Thermalquelle|ja|温泉|1=Onsen|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} (formerly part of the old {{ill|Ritsuryō State|de|Ritsuryō‑Staat|ja|令制国|lt=State|lt_ja=国|lt_de=State|12=draft}} {{ill|Mutsu Province|de|Mutsu‑Provinz|ja|陸奥国|12=draft}}; and since the {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} era, part of the old {{ill|Iwaki Province|de|Iwaki‑Provinz|ja|磐城国|12=draft}}). == Water Quality == * Simple weak radioactive cold mineral spring ** {{ill|Spring Source|de|Quell|ja|源泉|12=draft}}{{ill|Temperature|de|Temperatur|ja|温度|12=draft}}8.0°C == Hot Spring Area == Although there is no {{ill|Hot Spring Town|de|Onsen‑Stadt|ja|温泉街|12=draft}}, there are two {{ill|Inn|de|Gasthaus|ja|旅館|12=draft}}s located in the basin of {{ill|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|de|Imadegawa (Fukushima)|ja|今出川 (福島県)|lt=Imadegawa|lt_ja=今出川|lt_de=Imadegawa|12=draft}}. Novels set in the local inns have also been written, such as {{ill|Yasuo Uchida|de|Yasuo Uchida|ja|内田康夫|12=draft}}’s “Thirteen Tombstones” and {{ill|Seiichi Funahashi|de|Seiichi Funahashi|ja|舟橋聖一|12=draft}}’s “A Certain Woman’s Distant View”. == History == This hot spring is said to be associated with the mid‑Heian period female {{ill|Poet|de|Dichter|ja|歌人|12=draft}}, {{ill|Izumi Shikibu|de|Izumi Shikibu|ja|和泉式部|12=draft}}. According to the {{ill|Legend of the Spring’s Opening|de|Legende der Quelle|ja|開湯伝説|1=Onsen Origin Myth|12=draft}}, when Izumi Shikibu was en route to Kyoto, she left her {{ill|Cat|de|Katze|ja|ネコ|lt=Beloved Cat|lt_ja=愛猫|lt_de=Geliebte Katze|12=draft}} behind. It is said that the abandoned cat continued to cry in search of its master, Izumi Shikibu. Consequently, the hot spring came to be known as Neko‑naki Onsen. Later, although the cat fell ill, it regained its vitality after soaking in the hot spring. This discovery of the mineral spring’s healing properties by the locals led to the development of the area as a spa resort. == Access == * By car: approximately 20 minutes via {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma‑Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}, and approximately 40 minutes via {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku‑Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} from {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}}. * By train: approximately a 15‑minute walk from {{ill|Mizugun Line|de|Mizugun‑Linie|ja|水郡線|12=draft}} {{ill|Ishikawa Station|de|Ishikawa Bahnhof|ja|磐城石川駅|12=draft}}. == Related Topics == * Hot springs in Ishikawa Town ** {{ill|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Katakura Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|片倉温泉 (福島県)|lt=Katakura Onsen|lt_ja=片倉温泉|lt_de=Katakura Onsen|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Haha-bata Onsen|de|Haha-bata Onsen|ja|母畑温泉|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|de|Shionosawa Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|塩ノ沢温泉 (福島県)|lt=Shionosawa Onsen|lt_ja=塩ノ沢温泉|lt_de=Shionosawa Onsen|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://navi.town.ishikawa.fukushima.jp/blog/entry/003989.html Tour the four hot spring resorts of Ishikawa Town and enjoy the renowned “spa treatment” experience.] - Ishikawa Town * [https://www.minyu-net.com/serial/f-onsen/FM20180429-265897.php Fukushima Onsen Exploration: Neko‑naki Onsen] - {{ill|Fukushima Minyu Newspaper|de|Fukushima Minyu Zeitung|ja|福島民友新聞|12=draft}} {{Onsen-stub}} Nekodaki Onsen is a radioactive spring {{draft categories| [[Category:Fukushima Prefecture Hot Springs]] [[Category:Ishikawa Town]] [[Category:Izumi Shikibu]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:福島県の温泉]] [[Category:石川町]] [[Category:和泉式部]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Radioactive spring]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:猫啼温泉]] [[de:Katzenweinen Onsen]] [[sn:Nekodaki Onsen]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Nekodaki Onsen}} {{Onsen}}

{{infobox Onsen |Name = Neko-naki Onsen |image = 猫啼温泉郷看板 2012.jpg |Comment = {{Infobox mapframe|zoom=12|frame-width=300}} |Location = {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|de|Fukushima-Präfektur|ja|福島県|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa District|de|Ishikawa-Kreis|ja|石川郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Ishikawa Town|de|Ishikawa-Stadt|ja|石川町|12=draft}} |Access = By car: from {{ill|Abukuma Kogen Road|de|Abukuma-Hochlandstraße|ja|あぶくま高原道路|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tamagawa Interchange (Fukushima)|de|Tamagawa Anschlussstelle (Fukushima)|ja|玉川インターチェンジ (福島県)|lt=Tamagawa IC|lt_ja=玉川IC|lt_de=Tamagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 20 minutes, and from {{ill|Tohoku Expressway|de|Tohoku-Autobahn|ja|東北自動車道|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sukagawa Interchange|de|Sukagawa Anschlussstelle|ja|須賀川インターチェンジ|lt=Sukagawa IC|lt_ja=須賀川IC|lt_de=Sukagawa IC|12=draft}} via {{ill|National Route 118|de|Nationalstraße 118|ja|国道118号|12=draft}} for approximately 40 minutes.
